narrative:
Precinct Toledo 2E (precinct in Lucas County) has 940 registered voters, with 76.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 3.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 16.8 percentage points.
